red.instruction: Write failing tests for all ACs. Tests must FAIL when run against current main.

green.instruction: Make these failing tests pass without violating constraints.

review.instruction: Fresh-eyes verification + review. (1) For each requirement, run its verify command, interpret output, decide whether genuinely satisfied (exit 0 necessary not sufficient — check tests actually ran, expected behavior exercised, satisfaction not gamed). Update each requirement.satisfied. (2) Semantic review of diff against spec. Output JSON: {"verdict":"APPROVED|NEEDS_FIXES","requirement_status":[{"id":"AC-1","satisfied":true,"evidence":"...","remediation":null}],"review_findings":[{"severity":"HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW","issue":"...","location":"file:line"}],"summary":"..."}
